.tm2_pt3 .kv {
  position: relative;
  padding: 0 16px;
  margin: 0 0 64px;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-inner {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: auto;
}

  max-width: 416px;
  z-index: 5;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-info01{
  position: relative;
  max-width: 416px;
  z-index: 5;
  transform: translateX(-100%);
  left: 102%;
  margin-top:-284px;
  /*予約円形
  left: 105%;
  margin-top:-340px;*/
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-ttl {
  text-align: center;
  border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 30px 20px 46px;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-sub-ttl {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.4;
  border-radius: 3px;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 0 20px;
  margin: 0 0 8px;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-sub-ttl::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 4px;
  left: 0;
  display: block;
  width: 2px;
  height: 28px;
  background: #333;
  transform: rotate(-30deg);
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-sub-ttl::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 4px;
  display: block;
  width: 2px;
  height: 28px;
  background: #333;
  transform: rotate(30deg);
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-sub-ttl span {
  color: #3497D6;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-main-ttl {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 47px;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #2975C1;
  line-height: 1.4;
  border-radius: 3px;
  background: #fff;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-main-ttl span {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-main-ttl span::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: -2px;
  left: 50%;
  display: block;
  width: 9px;
  height: 9px;
  border-radius: 100%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-main-ttl span:nth-of-type(3n + 1)::before {
  background: #DE0415;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-main-ttl span:nth-of-type(3n + 2)::before {
  background: #05A53C;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-main-ttl span:nth-of-type(3n + 3)::before {
  background: #FFE102;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-contact {
  position: relative;
  border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
  background: #0E3068;
  padding: 50px 20px 30px;
  margin: 0 0 24px;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-contact-label {
  position: absolute;
  top: -24px;
  right: 40px;
  left: 40px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #0E3068;
  line-height: 1.4;
  text-align: center;
  border: 2px solid #0E3068;
  border-radius: 3px;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 16px;
  z-index: 5;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-contact-label::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% - 6px);
  left: 50%;
  display: block;
  width: 28px;
  height: 18px;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 50% 100%);
  background: #fff;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  z-index: 1;
}
.tm2_pt3 .kv-contact-label::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 100%;
  left: 50%;
  display: block;
  width: 26px;
  height: 16px;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 50% 100%);
  background: #0E3068;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}

$(function() {
  var pageURL = location.pathname,
      pageURLArr = pageURL.split('/'),
      pageURLArrCategory = pageURLArr[1];
  $(".header-nav-item > a:not([target='_blank'])").each(function(i, v) {

    } else {
      $(this).removeClass("is-open");
      $(spnav).removeClass("is-open");
      $(spnav).addClass("is-close");
      bodyFixReset();
    }
  });
  var scrollPosition;
  function bodyFix() {
    scrollPosition = $(window).scrollTop();
    $("body").css({
      "top": -scrollPosition
    }).addClass("is-fixed");
  }
  function bodyFixReset() {
    $("body").removeAttr("style").removeClass("is-fixed");
    $("html, body").scrollTop(scrollPosition);
  }
  
  if (window.matchMedia( "(min-width: 768px)" ).matches) {
    $(".accordion, mega-menu").hover(function() {
      $(".mega-menu").stop().fadeIn("fast");
    }, function() {
      $(".mega-menu").stop().fadeOut("fast");
    });
  }
});

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const cta = document.querySelector('.fixed-cta01');
  const footer = document.querySelector('.footer');

  if (!cta || !footer) return;

  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;

  const hideOffset = 300;   // 下スクロール時：どれくらいで隠すか
  const showOffset = 140;    // 上スクロール時：どれくらいで再表示するか（小さいほど早く出る）

  function checkCTA() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;
    const scrollingDown = currentScrollY > lastScrollY;

    const footerTop = footer.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY;
    const scrollBottom = window.scrollY + window.innerHeight;

    if (scrollingDown) {
      // 下スクロール時
      if (scrollBottom >= footerTop + hideOffset) {
      }
    } else {
      // 上スクロール時
      if (scrollBottom < footerTop + showOffset) {
      }
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener('scroll', checkCTA);
  window.addEventListener('resize', checkCTA);
  checkCTA();
});

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const excludeCategoryIds = ["1", "21"]; // 採用情報, 社長ブログ

  // --- タブ削除 ---
  excludeCategoryIds.forEach((id) => {
    document.querySelectorAll(".news-nav .category-id-" + id).forEach((tab) => tab.remove());
  });

  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll(".news-nav li");
  const items = document.querySelectorAll(".news-list-item");

  // --- 記事削除 ---
  items.forEach((item) => {
    const catSpan = item.querySelector(".cat");
    const itemCategoryId = (catSpan?.className.match(/category-id-(\d+)/) || [])[1];
    if (excludeCategoryIds.includes(itemCategoryId)) item.remove();
  });

  // --- フィルタ関数 ---
  function filterArticles(categoryId) {
    const visibleItems = [];

    document.querySelectorAll(".news-list-item").forEach((item) => {
      const catSpan = item.querySelector(".cat");
      const itemCategoryId = (catSpan?.className.match(/category-id-(\d+)/) || [])[1];

      const shouldShow = !categoryId || categoryId === "all" || itemCategoryId === categoryId;

      if (shouldShow) visibleItems.push(item);
      else item.style.display = "none";
    });

    // 最新5件だけ表示
    visibleItems.forEach((item, i) => {
      item.style.display = i < 5 ? "block" : "none";
    });
  }

  // --- タブクリック ---
  tabs.forEach((tab) => {
    tab.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();

      tabs.forEach((t) => t.querySelector("a").classList.remove("is-active"));
      this.querySelector("a").classList.add("is-active");

      const categoryClass = [...this.classList].find((c) => c.startsWith("category-id-"));
      const categoryId = categoryClass ? categoryClass.replace("category-id-", "") : null;

      filterArticles(categoryId);
    });
  });

  // --- 初期表示 ---
  filterArticles("all");
});

/*  begin parts js..  parts_id : 4736  */
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const insightsSection = document.querySelector(".news.insights-news");
  if (!insightsSection) return;

  const listContainer = insightsSection.querySelector(".news-list");

  // ▼ `.news-link` を除いた記事だけ取得
  const items = Array.from(listContainer.querySelectorAll(".news-list-item"));
  const newsLink = listContainer.querySelector(".news-link");

  // --- 日付で並び替え（新しい順） ---
  items.sort((a, b) => {
    const dateA = new Date(a.querySelector(".news-list-date").textContent.trim());
    const dateB = new Date(b.querySelector(".news-list-date").textContent.trim());
    return dateB - dateA; // 降順
  });

  // ▼ `.news-link` の **前に** 並び替えた要素を再配置
  items.forEach(item => listContainer.insertBefore(item, newsLink));

  const tabs = insightsSection.querySelectorAll(".news-nav li");

  function filterInsights() {
    const activeTab = document.querySelector(".news-nav .is-active span");
    const activeText = activeTab ? activeTab.textContent.trim() : "";

    items.forEach((item) => {
      const catSpan = item.querySelector(".news-list-category");
      const itemCategoryText = catSpan?.textContent.trim();

      const show =
        activeText === "" || activeText === "すべて" || itemCategoryText === activeText;

      item.style.display = show ? "block" : "none";
    });
  }

  tabs.forEach((tab) => {
    tab.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();

      tabs.forEach((t) => t.querySelector("a").classList.remove("is-active"));
      this.querySelector("a").classList.add("is-active");

      filterInsights();
    });
  });

  filterInsights();
});

    }
  });
  var scrollPosition;
  function bodyFix() {

    $("body").css({
      "top": -scrollPosition
    }).addClass("is-fixed");
  }
  function bodyFixReset() {
    $("body").removeAttr("style").removeClass("is-fixed");
    $("html, body").scrollTop(scrollPosition);
  }
  
  $(".sp-hbg-menu-item.accordion").on("click", function() {
    if ($(this).hasClass("is-open")) {

      $(this).addClass("is-open");
    }
  });
});
